more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work

more.title: Fuel prices surge in Zimbabwe

more.title: “Once a soldier, always a soldier”: Retired generals issue stern warning to Mliswa
more.description: HARARE - A group of retired generals led by Air Marshal (Retired) Henry Muchena has warned former Norton legislator Temba Mliswa over his remarks on their submission to Parliament regarding Constitutional Amendment Bill No. 3, insisting their actions were constitutional and reaffirming their stance with the declaration that “once a soldier, always a soldier.” The post “Once a soldier, always a soldier”: Retired generals issue stern warning to Mliswa appeared first on Nehanda Radio .
